data.location: 1400 10th St Unit D, West Palm Beach, FL 33401
data.short_description: Baisel's African Restaurant is opening to bring Ghanaian and West African food to West Palm Beach. The menu will include egusi, fufu, banku, okra soup, palm nut soup, pepper soup, peanut soup, jollof rice and grilled tilapia. It will start with about 14 seats focused on pickup with limited seating.

data.status: targeting an opening in about two months
data.short_description: Mikey's Pizzeria is taking over the former Pizza and Pints location. The 2,700-square-foot space will have about 45 indoor seats and 20-30 outdoor seats with counter service, beer and wine, and arcade games. It will serve pizza by the slice, 18-inch pies, and build-your-own pizzas at night.

data.location: 300 W. Tyler St., Suite A, Tampa, FL 33602
data.status: targeting a late January or early February 2027 opening
data.short_description: Matilde Coastal Mexican Kitchen is coming to the AER Tampa building. The restaurant will seat about 330 guests with full-service dining, indoor and outdoor seating along the Riverwalk, and live music on weekends. The menu will focus on coastal Mexican cooking and steakhouse elements using live fire.

Botanico is an upscale Latin concept returning to a new Midtown location in the former Lure space. It will have around 150 seats as an affordable luxury casual neighborhood restaurant. The menu will draw from Colombia, Venezuela, Mexico, Peru, Cuba and the Caribbean with seafood, steaks and tropical flavors.

data.location: 1025 Howell Mill Rd NW, Atlanta, GA 30318
data.short_description: Incognito is a modern chic dive bar with elevated mixology in West Midtown. It will offer food from El Santo Gallo taqueria truck along with pool tables, DJ, and screens. The cocktail program will be refined.

data.status: planned to open October 29th at 10 a.m.
data.short_description: Knuckies Sandwiches and Sips will be the 10th location and an elevated version with chef-driven sandwiches and dirty sodas. The 1,100-square-foot spot at Medley will offer counter service for dine-in or takeout. The menu includes cheesesteaks, Italian, crab cake sandwich, lobster roll and Sparkraft dirty sodas.

data.location: 4725 S Atlanta Rd SE, Atlanta, GA 30339
data.status: expected to open in the next 60-70 days
data.short_description: Trap Wingz is opening its third location in a former Bites space. The takeout-focused spot will serve crispy wings, burgers, fried fish, Philly cheesesteaks and fries.

data.status: expected to open in the next 60-90 days
data.short_description: Trap Wingz is opening its fourth location. The takeout-focused spot will serve crispy wings, burgers, fried fish, Philly cheesesteaks and fries.

data.location: 2259 Dr. Randy McDaniel Way, Middleton, FL 34762
data.short_description: Piesanos Stone Fired Pizza is opening its 16th location and third in The Villages area. The new build will have about 150 seats with full-service dining, full bar, patio, and Express To-Go area. The menu centers on granite stone-fired pizzas, pastas and Italian dishes.

Halftime Hangout Sports Bar is a neighborhood sports bar with pool table, dart boards, karaoke, trivia and possible live music. The menu will include smash burgers, salads, wings and Louisiana dishes like gumbo and po’boys. It plans family-and-friends event on the 15th with official opening to be announced.

Churp is a simplified clean-eating bowl concept from the co-founder of Happy and Hale. The menu will feature healthy bowls with rice, chicken, vegetables, sauces and a kids menu. It will partner with influencers for special bowls.

Topsail Steamer is a take-home seafood boil concept. Customers order buckets packed with fresh seafood and fixings to steam at home. It offers signature and custom buckets with clams, crab legs, shrimp and more.

Crooked Can Brewing Company is opening a large-scale destination brewery and venue. The 42,500-square-foot space will have brewing, expansive taproom, bars, beer garden and kids areas. It will feature 11 food vendors and core beers.

The Abigaile is a Modern American Cuisine restaurant from Chef Tina Calhoon going into the former Craven Copper space. It will have about 80 indoor and 80 outdoor seats with craft bar and live music. The menu is flexible with items like confit wings and chicken shawarma salad.

data.store_name: Faraway Joes Family Friendly Subs & More
data.location: 320 East Tarpon Avenue, Tarpon Springs, FL 34689
data.status: targeting an opening in about four weeks
data.short_description: Faraway Joes Family Friendly Subs & More is opening inside Tarpon Springs Castle Winery. The quick-service shop will offer sandwiches, hot dogs, mini donuts, cotton candy and family activities.

data.location: 2079 Joseph E Boone Blvd NW Atlanta, GA 30314
data.event_date: end of May or early June
data.status: slated to open by the end of May or early June
data.short_description: Black Pizza Bankhead is a family-friendly New York-style pizzeria. It will offer slices, full pies, wings, fries and family specials with in-house sauce.

data.event_date: end of June or first week of July
data.status: targeting an end of June or first week of July opening
data.short_description: Lenny's Grill & Subs is returning to Pensacola as a franchise. The neighborhood sub shop will offer fresh-sliced meats, cheesesteaks, hot/cold subs, salads and wraps with multiple ordering options.
Salty Neighbor Bar & Grill is a veteran-owned sports bar in the former Rib City space. It will have 144 indoor seats and 20 outdoor with TVs and American bar food with Cuban influence.

data.status: planning to open in early June
data.short_description: Early Bird Cafe is a quick-service breakfast spot for commuters. The menu will include breakfast sandwiches, New York bagels, bowls, waffles and French toast sticks with curbside pickup.

data.location: 1530 Pasadena Avenue South, South Pasadena, FL 33707
data.status: soft opening planned for May 12 and a grand opening scheduled for May 18
data.short_description: Burger Monger is opening its first drive-through location. The corporate spot will seat about 90 with counter service and build-your-own burgers, signature items, fries and shakes.

data.location: 675 W Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA 30308
data.short_description: Pour Intentions Wine Bar is a wine-focused lounge with charcuterie, small plates and desserts. It will feature a rotating by-the-glass wine list.
V’s Coffee Collab is a compact coffee shop with house-roasted coffee, pastries and retail bags. It will have limited seating and outdoor programming.
Juice Time is a dessert and beverage spot with juices, smoothies, crepes and international desserts.

data.location: 30 Concord Commons Pl SW, Concord, NC 28027
data.short_description: 360 Wine and Spirits is a wine bar with spirits and neighborhood bar atmosphere.
Blush Room is a new nightlife lounge concept.

data.event_date: toward the end of the month
data.status: targeting a soft opening toward the end of the month
data.short_description: Three Rabbits Brewing is finishing its taproom and will begin brewing.

data.status: planned reopening in late May or early June
data.short_description: Sunset Restaurant is being revived as a longtime Franklin staple.

Sonrisa is a Latin American restaurant and bar opening in Brevard Court. It will have about 70 indoor seats and 16-20 patio seats in a casual homey atmosphere. The menu draws from multiple Latin American cuisines with empanadas, ceviche, flank steak, chicken tinga, birria and regional cocktails.

data.location: 1410 Lake Hearn Dr NE, Atlanta, GA 30319
data.status: planning a July or August opening
data.short_description: Dish's Bagels is planning a new location with the space currently under construction. The menu will feature New York-style bagels, breakfast sandwiches, lox, and deli sandwiches.
A new American Deli franchise location is in the works. They are getting permits and preparing to start remodeling.

data.location: 863 Ponce De Leon Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30306
data.event_date: about a month to a month and a half
data.status: targeting an opening in about a month to a month and a half
data.short_description: Pollo Primo is planning a second location with buildout underway.

data.location: 2131 Pleasant Hill Rd. Suite B-1, Duluth, GA 30096
data.short_description: Blue Polar is a dessert cafe serving gelato, coffee, smoothies, teas, lattes, cakes, cookies and small sandwiches.

data.store_name: Pizzeria Fiamma / MackinMikes Mac & Cheeze Bar
data.short_description: Pizzeria Fiamma and MackinMikes Mac & Cheeze Bar are two food concepts opening inside Crooked Can Brewery.

data.location: 11650 Johns Creek Pkwy, Johns Creek, GA 30097
data.short_description: The Nest Cafe is opening its third metro Atlanta location in the Medley development. It will be the largest at 2,700 square feet with about 40 indoor and 20 outdoor seats. The menu includes breakfast, brunch, croissant sandwiches, paninis, salads and rotating seasonal specials.

data.status: planning to open by the end of June
data.short_description: The Reserve Key West is a culinary collective with four restaurant concepts in a former bank building. Concepts include Spanish tapas, fresh seafood, Italian cuisine, and sushi/Thai. Guests can order from all menus via QR or directly with 125 seats and live music.

data.location: 10570 West Forest Hill Boulevard, Wellington, FL 33414
data.short_description: Diadem Pickleball Complex is an indoor facility with courts, pro shop, simulators and event space. It will include Cat 5 restaurant and bar.

data.location: 10570 West Forest Hill Boulevard, Wellington, FL 33414
data.short_description: Cat 5 is a restaurant and bar inside Diadem Pickleball Complex serving pizza, salads, beer and wine with court service.

data.store_name: Pilar Coffee Bar and Iced Treats
data.location: 7100 Fairway Drive, Unit 23, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418
data.short_description: Pilar Coffee Bar and Iced Treats is a franchise location offering coffee, gelato, food and desserts in quick-service format. It will have around 40 indoor seats and an outside patio.

data.location: 7573 Raymary St, Units A-B, Bokeelia, FL 33922
data.status: targeting mid-May for the launch of hot food service
data.short_description: Coconut Island Market is already open as a convenience market and is adding hot food service. Planned items include tacos, hamburgers, burritos, fruit cups and aguas frescas.

data.location: 1189 SW Pine Island Rd., Cape Coral, FL 33991
data.status: targeting a late May or early June opening
data.short_description: Coffee Rush is a drive-thru coffee concept opening its second Florida location.

data.location: 12741 Yellow Bluff Rd., Suites 1 and 2, Jacksonville, FL 32226
data.status: targeting an early to mid-August opening
data.short_description: Southern Smokehouse is a full-service barbecue restaurant from South Atlantic Hospitality. It will have 120 seats and a full bar with traditional barbecue items, salads, and weekly specials.
Blackberry Creamery & Cafe is an ice cream-focused concept in an outdoor food truck park. It will serve ice cream flavors, milkshakes, shaved ice and lemonades.
Supra Revolving Sushi Bar is a full-service restaurant with conveyor belt sushi, hibachi, ramen and appetizers.

data.location: 12553 Bartram Park Blvd., Suite 302, Jacksonville, FL 32258
data.short_description: Lucky Goat Coffee is a fast-casual shop with espresso drinks, cold brew, seasonal lattes and pastries.
Big Bone BBQ will serve Texas-style barbecue focused on dino beef ribs, brisket and smoked beef cheeks in a self-serve historic home setting.
Donatos Pizza is opening with thin crust party-cut pizzas, subs, salads and wings in a fast-casual setup with limited seating.
